nodes.title: Skills Index
nodes.summary: Index of all 33+ operational skills organized by project.

nodes.title: Agent Architecture
nodes.summary: Principles and patterns governing how our AI agent system works. 26 nodes covering cognition, memory, coordination, knowledge, and risk. Inspired by Heinrich's skill graph research.

nodes.title: Image Generation Pipeline
nodes.summary: End-to-end pipeline for generating consistent AI model images using ComfyUI + Flux on vast.ai GPUs.

nodes.title: Model Onboarding
nodes.summary: End-to-end process for setting up a new AI model from persona creation to first revenue.

nodes.title: Fanvue Posting Workflow
nodes.summary: Content posting, scheduling, and monetization workflow for Fanvue AI models.

nodes.title: Social Growth Playbook
nodes.summary: Multi-platform social growth strategy for OFM AI models. TikTok first, then Instagram, dating apps later.

nodes.title: Agent Cognition
nodes.summary: Central concept: how AI agents think, reason, and make decisions. The intersection of memory, knowledge, tools, and scaffolding that produces intelligent behavior. Everything in agent architecture connects back to cognition.

nodes.title: Content Calendar Management
nodes.summary: Planning and scheduling content across all models and platforms. Ensures consistent output and prevents gaps.

nodes.title: Aitable
nodes.summary: Operations database (Airtable alternative). Workspace "Verboten Industries". Stores OFM model data, face/body refs, and operational tracking.

nodes.title: LoRA Training
nodes.summary: Training custom LoRA models to create consistent AI personas. Each model gets its own LoRA for face/body consistency.

nodes.title: OFM Skills Index
nodes.summary: All operational skills for the OFM (OnlyFans Management) agency. AI-first on Fanvue. Target: $10K/mo per AI model, $50K/mo overall.

nodes.title: Dream Cycle Learning
nodes.summary: Orchestrated vault creation transforms the system from tool to autonomous knowledge factory. The nightly dream cycle consolidates, links, and surfaces patterns humans miss.

nodes.title: Instagram
nodes.summary: Social growth platform for OFM models. Mother-slave account strategy. Feeds traffic to Fanvue.

nodes.title: Fanvue
nodes.summary: Fan subscription platform that explicitly allows AI-generated content. Primary monetization platform for OFM AI models.

nodes.title: OFM Agency
nodes.summary: OnlyFans Management agency. #1 business priority. AI-first on Fanvue. Target $50K/mo.

nodes.title: Fanvue Platform Knowledge
nodes.summary: Domain knowledge about Fanvue platform mechanics, algorithms, pricing, and competitive positioning.

nodes.title: AI Model Creation
nodes.summary: State of AI image/video generation tech. Flux, LoRA, ComfyUI, and the tools powering AI creator content.

nodes.title: Processing Workflow
nodes.summary: How agents receive, route, prioritize, and execute tasks. The pipeline from user message to completed action, including tool selection, sub-agent delegation, and result synthesis.

nodes.title: Scaffolding Enables Divergence
nodes.summary: Scaffolding enables divergence that fine-tuning cannot. AGENTS.md, SOUL.md, and structured prompts let agents develop distinct behaviors without model-level changes. Configuration over training.

nodes.title: Cognitive Offloading
nodes.summary: The architectural foundation for scalable agents. Externalize to files, crons, tools, and structured data instead of holding everything in context.

nodes.title: Agent Cognition Hooks
nodes.summary: Points where agents can intercept, modify, or redirect their own processing. Memory recall before answering, skill discovery before executing, safety checks before acting. The hooks define agent behavior more than the base model.

nodes.title: Session Recap
nodes.summary: End-of-session auto-summarizer. Extracts decisions, actions, commitments and appends to daily notes.

nodes.title: Social Media Growth
nodes.summary: Domain knowledge on platform algorithms, growth tactics, and audience building for creator economy.

nodes.title: Session Handoff Pattern
nodes.summary: Session handoff creates continuity without persistent memory. Each session reads files, does work, writes back. The files are the continuity, not the session.

nodes.title: Vault as Identity
nodes.summary: The vault constitutes identity for agents. SOUL.md + MEMORY.md + daily notes = who the agent is across sessions. Without these files, the agent is generic.

nodes.title: Memory Separation Principle
nodes.summary: Agent self-memory should be architecturally separate from user knowledge systems. Our memory/ vault holds context about Beno; knowledge/ holds operational capabilities.

nodes.title: Fresh Context Principle
nodes.summary: Fresh context per task preserves quality better than chaining phases. This is why we spawn sub-agents instead of running long chains in one session.

nodes.title: Entities Index
nodes.summary: Index of all entities: people, platforms, businesses, and assets.

nodes.title: Context Rescue
nodes.summary: Proactive mid-session snapshots before context compression. Fires automatically when sessions get long, writing structured checkpoints to daily notes.

nodes.title: Fact Vault
nodes.summary: Structured SQLite store for precise factual lookups. Entity-key-value triples with BM25 search. Complements QMD with precision queries.

nodes.title: Goal-Driven Memory
nodes.summary: Goal-driven memory retrieval enables autonomous domain learning through directed compute allocation. Agents that know WHAT they need to learn can direct their own research, not just respond to queries.

nodes.title: Session Outputs as Packets
nodes.summary: Session outputs are packets for future sessions. Daily notes, recaps, and memory updates are not just records - they are structured data packets that future agent sessions consume. Write for the next session, not for archives.

nodes.title: Cognitive Outsourcing Risk
nodes.summary: Over-reliance on agent intelligence creates fragility. If the human stops understanding the system, they lose the ability to course-correct. The human must remain the architect, not just the operator.

nodes.title: Provenance Tracking
nodes.summary: Track where beliefs and knowledge come from. Source citations in memory files, dated entries, conversation references. Prevents hallucinated confidence.

nodes.title: Design Patterns as Cognitive Scaffolding
nodes.summary: Design patterns function as cognitive scaffolding that enables attention during complex tasks. Naming a pattern (like 'stigmergy' or 'progressive disclosure') gives agents anchors to reason about architecture.

nodes.title: Coherent Architecture Through Wikilinks
nodes.summary: Coherent architecture emerges from wiki links spreading activation and diffusion through knowledge topology. Connected nodes create meaning the same way neurons create thought - through structure, not content alone.

nodes.title: Stigmergy Coordination
nodes.summary: Agents coordinate through environmental traces (files, notes, task states) without direct communication. Like ants leaving pheromone trails.

nodes.title: Transcript Mining
nodes.summary: Session transcript mining enables experiential validation that structural tests cannot provide. Extract knowledge from conversations, not just documents.

nodes.title: Verboten Industries
nodes.summary: Holding entity / umbrella namespace. Aitable workspace name.

nodes.title: Voice Journal
nodes.summary: Voice journal transcription and structured extraction. Transcribe voice notes, extract intentions, gratitude, wins, actions.

nodes.title: Domain Knowledge Index
nodes.summary: Index of all domain knowledge: industry expertise, market data, and regulatory info.

nodes.title: System Takes Cycles
nodes.summary: You operate a system that takes cycles. Nothing works perfectly on the first pass. Dream cycles, sprint retrospectives, daily standups - iteration is the architecture, not a failure mode.

nodes.title: Agent Trust Asymmetry
nodes.summary: Agents are simultaneously technology, executors, and subjects - creating a unique trust asymmetry. You trust a hammer differently than you trust a colleague. Agents occupy both roles, which requires new trust frameworks.

nodes.title: Federated Wiki Pattern
nodes.summary: Federated wiki pattern enables multi-agent divergence as feature, not bug. Each agent maintains their own knowledge nodes. Divergent perspectives get reconciled through structure, not forced consensus.

nodes.title: Temporal Media Conversion
nodes.summary: Temporal media (voice notes, video, live conversation) must convert to spatial text for agents to process. Agents cannot rewind or skim audio. Transcription is not optional - it is architectural.

nodes.title: Knowledge as Communication Partner
nodes.summary: Knowledge systems become communication partners through composability. When memory formats are structured and linked, agents don't just retrieve - they converse with the knowledge graph. Dead files become living context.

nodes.title: Prospective Memory
nodes.summary: Prospective memory (remembering to do things in the future) requires externalization. Crons, reminders, HEARTBEAT, and task queues are external prospective memory.

nodes.title: Three Capture Schools Converge
nodes.summary: Three knowledge capture traditions (personal knowledge management, institutional knowledge management, and AI memory systems) converge through agent-mediated synthesis. Our vault blends all three.

nodes.title: Lagoon Company
nodes.summary: ATV/UTV/scooter/yacht rental company in Tulum. Main income source since 2021. thelagooncompany.mx

nodes.title: Model Router
nodes.summary: Model routing guidance and session overrides. Manage which AI model handles which task for cost/speed optimization.

nodes.title: Memory Optimizer
nodes.summary: Memory vault optimization and dream cycle support. Manages memory file health and consolidation.

nodes.title: Sprint Tracker
nodes.summary: 2-week sprint tracker via Telegram. Log work time, milestones, goals. Sprint status and retrospectives.

nodes.title: Skill Scanner
nodes.summary: Security audit for skills before installation. Checks for prompt injection, data exfiltration, malicious patterns.

nodes.title: Thread Distill
nodes.summary: Extract decisions, open questions, and next steps from pasted conversation threads. Structure any text dump.

nodes.title: Frustration Reveals Architecture
nodes.summary: When something breaks or frustrates, it reveals the underlying architecture. Friction points are diagnostic signals about structural problems. Debug by following the frustration.

nodes.title: Ga4
nodes.summary: Query Google Analytics 4 for traffic stats. Sessions, users, top pages, traffic sources, realtime data.

nodes.title: Fleet Log
nodes.summary: Fleet maintenance tracker for Lagoon Company vehicles. Log services, report incidents, track what's overdue.

nodes.title: Review Harvester
nodes.summary: Monitor Google Maps reviews and draft replies. Semi-auto and full-auto modes for review management.

nodes.title: Rental Ops
nodes.summary: Daily rental operations for Lagoon Company. Track active rentals, returns, damage, fuel, revenue.

nodes.title: Dm Copilot
nodes.summary: OFM DM drafting and outreach copywriting. Write in a model's voice, fan DMs, recruit outreach, brand pitches.

nodes.title: Meta Ads Report
nodes.summary: Pull Meta ad performance reports via Graph API. Spend, impressions, clicks, conversions, CAC tracking.

nodes.title: Ofm Scheduler
nodes.summary: OFM content operations manager. Track content due dates, manage approval queue, log what went live.

nodes.title: Ofm Metrics
nodes.summary: OFM analytics layer. Revenue per creator, top/bottom performers, fan churn detection, revenue forecasting.

nodes.title: Social Mine
nodes.summary: Community intelligence from Reddit and X/Twitter. Extract pain points, market research, community signal into insight briefs.

nodes.title: Onboard Wizard
nodes.summary: Automated onboarding workflow for OFM models, brand partners, collaborators. Creates workspace, sends welcome, sets check-in crons.

nodes.title: Oaxaca Tracker
nodes.summary: CRETE/Hilltop Villa build tracker. Permits, contractors, materials, milestones, budget vs actuals for Oaxaca property.

nodes.title: Voice Caller
nodes.summary: Place real outbound phone calls via Twilio/Telnyx/Plivo. Notifications, IVR navigation, bill negotiation.

nodes.title: Receipt Snap
nodes.summary: Expense tracking via receipt photos or text. Log receipts, track spending summaries by month.

nodes.title: Tab Watcher
nodes.summary: Monitor URLs for content changes with Telegram notifications. Watch permit pages, analytics dashboards, any URL.

nodes.title: Bird Twitter
nodes.summary: Twitter/X CLI wrapper. Post tweets, reply, read, search, and manage timeline via GraphQL-based CLI.

nodes.title: X Twitter
nodes.summary: Read/write X (Twitter). Post tweets, read timeline, search, DMs. Browser-first with API fallback.

nodes.title: Pattern Coach
nodes.summary: Behavioral pattern monitor. Track sleep, exercise, stress, mood, energy. Alerts when precursor patterns detected.

nodes.title: Model Usage
nodes.summary: Anthropic token usage stats with progress bars. Track daily/weekly usage, API costs, and reset timers.

nodes.title: Standup Bot
nodes.summary: Structured daily work logging and standup generation. Done/Doing/Blocked output from logged entries.

nodes.title: Failover Watch
nodes.summary: VM health monitor with Telegram alerting and auto-remediation. Monitors disk, memory, CPU, gateway uptime, cron jobs.

nodes.title: Approval Buttons
nodes.summary: Inline Telegram buttons for sign-off workflows. Approve/Reject/Revise on proposals and tasks.

nodes.title: Grocy Bridge
nodes.summary: Chat-based inventory management via Grocy API. Track farm produce, fuel, building supplies with natural language.

nodes.title: Food Vision
nodes.summary: Calorie and macro tracking from food photos or text. Log meals, track daily/weekly nutrition totals.

nodes.title: Qwen3 Tts
nodes.summary: Text-to-speech via Qwen3-TTS/AIML API. 17 voices, cheap cloud API. Replaces ElevenLabs for voice generation.

nodes.title: Telegram
nodes.summary: Primary communications hub. Forum group "balsas.clawsbx" with topic channels for each domain.

nodes.title: Knowledge Graph Root
nodes.summary: Root entry point for the four-layer knowledge graph.
